App Header

Persistent chrome: logo, primary navigation tabs (Dashboard, Items, Settings), user avatar with dropdown.

Dashboard Screen

Landing screen after login. Shows the stats row and main table populated with mock data from window.__mockData.items.

Empty State

Shown when items array is empty. Illustrated empty-state with CTA button "Create your first item".

Rollout Notes

Prototype covers desktop-web only. Mobile-web prototype is deferred to sprint 2.
